data.title: Bronny James NBA Debut: Betting Odds As LeBron And Son Take The Court Together For First Time
data.description: The LA Lakers, a favorite to contend for the NBA championship, will see Bronny James play alongside father LeBron James.

data.title: SEC Charges Four Companies Over SolarWinds Hacks, Issues Millions In Penalties
data.description: The SEC charged four major companies for misleading disclosures about cybersecurity risks and breaches, including SolarWinds attack. Companies will pay fines and improve cybersecurity practices.

data.title: Tradepulse Power Inflow Alert: Booking Holdings Inc. Moves Up Over 24 Points In 2 Hours After Alert
Boeing Stock Rises Ahead Of Wednesday's Union Vote: Will Investors Breathe 'A Sigh Of Relief?' (CORRECTED)
data.description: Boeing and its striking machinists reached a preliminary agreement to resolve the five-week strike over the weekend.

data.title: McDonald's Stock Drops After CDC Identifies E. Coli Outbreak Linked To Quarter Pounders
data.description: McDonald's shares are dropping after Tuesday's closing bell following a CDC report stating an E. coli outbreak has been linked to McDonald's Quarter Pounder burgers.
